:orphan:

.. _correlations:

Correlations
============

.. note::

   Stateless physics correlations are documented in context on the pages
   where they are used:

   - :doc:`membrane` — ionomer conductivity, O₂/H₂ permeability, equilibrium isotherm, water diffusivity
   - :doc:`porous_layers` — gas diffusion, capillary pressure–saturation
   - :doc:`catalyst_layers` — O₂ film resistance, Butler-Volmer kinetics
   - :doc:`channels` — channel gas transport resistance
